label: Ritual behavior
description: Defines the roles, stages, duration, and spectator settings for a ritual. Referenced by RitualPatternDef via ritualBehavior.

workerClass.label: Worker class
workerClass.description: C# class that implements ritual behavior logic. Must extend RitualBehaviorWorker.

roles.label: Roles
roles.description: List of pawn roles required or optional for this ritual. Each li selects a role class via the Class attribute.

stages.label: Stages
stages.description: Ordered list of ritual stages. Each li selects a stage class via the Class attribute.

durationTicks.label: Duration ticks
durationTicks.description: IntRange controlling the minimum and maximum duration of the ritual in ticks. Defaults to 7500~7500.

preceptRequirements.label: Precept requirements
preceptRequirements.description: List of precept requirements that must be met for this ritual to start. Each li selects a class via the Class attribute.

cancellationTriggers.label: Cancellation triggers
cancellationTriggers.description: List of triggers that cancel the ritual if activated. Each li selects a class via the Class attribute.

displayCompletedMessage.label: Display completed message
displayCompletedMessage.description: If true, a completion letter is sent when this ritual finishes.

useVisualEffectsFromRoleIdIdeo.label: Use visual effects from role ID ideo
useVisualEffectsFromRoleIdIdeo.description: Role ID whose pawn's ideology visual effects are used for this ritual.

displayOrder.label: Display order
displayOrder.description: Sort order for this ritual behavior in UI lists.

letterTitle.label: Letter title
letterTitle.description: Title of the completion letter sent when this ritual finishes.

letterText.label: Letter text
letterText.description: Body text of the completion letter sent when this ritual finishes.

spectatorsLabel.label: Spectators label
spectatorsLabel.description: Label for the spectator role shown in the ritual UI. Must be set together with spectatorGerund.

spectatorGerund.label: Spectator gerund
spectatorGerund.description: Gerund form of the spectator action shown in duty status. Must be set together with spectatorsLabel.

spectatorsIgnoreBleeding.label: Spectators ignore bleeding
spectatorsIgnoreBleeding.description: If true, bleeding spectators do not interrupt or fail the ritual.

soundDefsPerEnhancerCount.label: Sound defs per enhancer count
soundDefsPerEnhancerCount.description: List of SoundDefs indexed by the number of active enhancer buildings. Index 0 = 0 enhancers.

maxEnhancerDistance.label: Max enhancer distance
maxEnhancerDistance.description: Maximum distance from the ritual spot at which enhancer buildings are counted.

spectatorFilter.label: Spectator filter
spectatorFilter.description: Singleton filter object controlling which pawns may spectate this ritual. Class attribute selects the subclass.

new-ritual-behavior.label: New ritual behavior
new-ritual-behavior.description: Minimal ritual behavior with roles and stages.
